title: Can I calculate a Timeline column?
excerpt: Is it possible to set the timeline start and end date values froma formula?  I am sync’ing from JIRA and I want to utilize the Timeline column so I can have a clear Gantt chart view of our work.  I cannot seem to figure …

posts.author: mfraser (Max)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to set the timeline start and end date values froma formula? I am sync’ing from JIRA and I want to utilize the Timeline column so I can have a clear Gantt chart view of our work. I cannot seem to figure this out.

has anyone been able to do this?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Max!

I am afraid it isn’t currently possible to set the timeline based on formula value. I’d encourage you to explore our apps marketplace for any third party tools that can accomplish this - one that might be relevant is general caster

posts.author: koko03_30 (Konstantin Botev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Max,

If you are looking for a way to automate the timeline, you can check out this app:

auth.monday.com

Timeline manipulator - monday.com Marketplace

Automations trigger timeline updates when column values change.

Best regards,
Konstantin
